s2.ptxt: Using a clip remover, remove the 13 clips and luggage compartment door cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR LOCK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the rod.
Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 2 bolts and luggage compartment door lock assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR LOCK CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the cable and connector.
Remove the 2 nuts and the luggage compartment door lock cylinder assembly.

atten4.ptxt: When removing the rear spoiler, heat the vehicle body and rear spoiler using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body and spoiler excessively.

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the rear spoiler.
Remove the 2 nuts.
Insert a piano wire between the vehicle body and rear spoiler.
Tie objects that can serve as handles (for example, wooden blocks) to both wire ends.
Pull the piano wire and scrape off the double-sided tape that holds the spoiler to the vehicle body.

item.ptxt: If reusing the spoiler, take care not to damage the spoiler.
Be careful not to damage the vehicle body.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 clips and remove the rear spoiler.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE DOOR OPENING SWITCH ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 2 screws and the luggage door opening switch assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT OUTSIDE DOOR GARNISH SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the luggage compartment door outside garnish.
Remove the 3 nuts.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 clips and remove the luggage compartment door outside garnish.
Disconnect the connector and clamp.
Remove the 3 nuts.
Disengage the pin and remove the rear light assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Be careful not to break the engaging portion of the pin when removing the rear light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LICENSE PLATE LIGHT ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the license plate light assembly as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LICENSE PLATE LIGHT ASSEMBLY RH
